title: DevSwarm / Generation Overview
description: One prompt in, one app out: generations, outcomes, time-to-app and the span load per agent role. All data from the swarm's own traces.

clickhouse_sql.name: A
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT count() AS value FROM signoz_traces.distributed_signoz_index_v3 WHERE serviceName='devswarm' AND name='generation' AND timestamp BETWEEN {{.start_datetime}} AND {{.end_datetime}}

clickhouse_sql.name: A
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT round(100 * countIf(attributes_string['devswarm.generation.verdict']='pass') / greatest(count(),1), 1) AS value FROM signoz_traces.distributed_signoz_index_v3 WHERE serviceName='devswarm' AND name='generation' AND timestamp BETWEEN {{.start_datetime}} AND {{.end_datetime}}

clickhouse_sql.name: A
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL 5 MINUTE) AS ts, round(avg(durationNano)/1e9, 1) AS value FROM signoz_traces.distributed_signoz_index_v3 WHERE serviceName='devswarm' AND name='generation' AND timestamp BETWEEN {{.start_datetime}} AND {{.end_datetime}} GROUP BY ts ORDER BY ts

widgets.title: LLM calls and latency by role

clickhouse_sql.name: A
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT attributes_string['devswarm.role'] AS role, count() AS calls, round(avg(durationNano)/1e9,1) AS avg_s, round(quantile(0.95)(durationNano)/1e9,1) AS p95_s, countIf(statusCode=2) AS errors FROM signoz_traces.distributed_signoz_index_v3 WHERE serviceName='devswarm' AND name LIKE 'llm.%' AND timestamp BETWEEN {{.start_datetime}} AND {{.end_datetime}} GROUP BY role ORDER BY calls DESC
